title: Epic: GHA migration follow-up from skopeo-sandbox review
body:
## Summary

Tracking epic for unresolved CI review feedback from the `podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox` Cirrus ‚Üí GHA migration.

The sandbox work landed upstream in PR #2883. These items are follow-up from sandbox PR https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1 / PR https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/9 review threads and the upstream audit before deprecating the sandbox repo.

## Sub-issues

- [ ] #2912 ‚Äî migrate `renovate.json5` to `podman-container-tools/automation`
- [ ] #2913 ‚Äî add zizmor workflow for GitHub Actions security scanning
- [ ] #2914 ‚Äî remove leftover Cirrus config after GHA migration
- [ ] #2915 ‚Äî remove `git safe.directory` workaround from container jobs
- [ ] #2916 ‚Äî golangci-lint installed via `make tools` instead of `golangci-lint-action`
- [ ] #2917 ‚Äî `ostree_rs_ext` job uses archived `ostree-rs-ext` repository
- [ ] #2918 ‚Äî `cancel-in-progress` cancels overlapping CI runs on `main` pushes
- [ ] #2922 ‚Äî `doccheck` does build + install before `validate-docs`
- [ ] #2923 ‚Äî redundant `make vendor` in `test_skopeo` job
- [ ] #2924 ‚Äî `ostree_rs_ext` reinstalls Rust and rebuilds dependencies every run

## Related (not sub-issues)

- PR #2911 ‚Äî Renovate-managed `AUTOMATION_RELEASE` in `ci.yml` (companion to #2912)
- Draft PR #2885 ‚Äî started `safe.directory` / Makefile `GOBIN` cleanup (companion to #2915)
- #2633 ‚Äî broader CI Switch: Cirrus ‚Üí TMT umbrella
- Draft PR #2640 ‚Äî TMT work including `ostree-rs-ext` (related to #2917)

## Background

- Sandbox: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox
- Upstream migration: PR #2883

comments.body:
@mtrmac please let me know if this is good. I opened the issues (even some of them has been worked on), as long as it is not completed. we can use this epic for track and discussion.

@Luap99  we can private or delete the sandbox repo.

@timcoding1988 Thanks for filing those, and especially for linking all the later context.

A few more things worth recording I think (all optimizations that shouldn‚Äôt materially change the test contents, so pretty low-priority):
- https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1#discussion_r3181672805 : `doccheck` should be possible to do with just `make validate-docs` without `make install` (and without removing `/usr/bin/skopeo`)
- https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1#discussion_r3182590794 : `make vendor` in the `test_skopeo` task is redundant (and `go mod verify` is fairly costly): that task depends on `validate` which already checked this
- https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1#discussion_r3182673020 : (If we preserve the `ostree_rs_ext` tests,) perhaps we can avoid installing Rust + dependencies on every run, by building into CI images or caching
